competition_rules.title: gate
competition_rules.content: - A set of two (2) buoys that should be passed by going through them

competition_rules.title: circle
competition_rules.content:
- Circle around a point with a safe distance (1-5m)
- Can be either clockwise (CW) or counter-clockwise (CCW) decided by other factors

competition_rules.title: dock
competition_rules.content:
- Dock in an availiable slot
- A slot is unavailiable if another object is occupying the midpoint of it.
- Outside factors might set slot-preferations

competition_rules.title: deliver
competition_rules.content:
- Can be either water or ball delivery
- Water should be delivered in at least 10 seconds with steady aim
- Balls should hit the target directly

competition_rules.title: start
competition_rules.content:
- Starting point of the mission
- Stay in this position heading towards the first mission before countinuing

competition_rules.title: Entry Gates
competition_rules.content:
- Contains two (2) "gate"-instances
- Each "gate" consist of one (1) "Green Tower (3)" and one (1) "Red Tower (4)"
- Each "gate" can have a max width of 12 meters
- Start by going through the gate closest to the "start"
- Task is completed when both gates have been passed

competition_rules.title: Exit Gates
competition_rules.content:
- Contains two (2) "gate"-instances
- Each "gate" consist of one (1) "Green Tower (3)" and one (1) "Red Tower (4)"
- Each "gate" can have a max width of 12 meters
- Start by going through the gate furthest away from the "start"
- Task is completed when both gates have been passed

competition_rules.title: Obstacle Course
competition_rules.content:
- Contains four (4) "gate"-instances
- Contains several obstacles that should be avoided
- Each "gate" consist of one (1) "Green Buoy (0)" and one (1) "Red Buoy (1)"
- All other elements are obstacles
- Each "gate" can have a max width of 8 meters
- After passing the last gate, navigate all the way past the obstacles in the same direction
- If there are any "Green Beacon (7)" in the obstacle course, "circle" it when passing it
- Task is completed when all gates and obstacles have been passed

competition_rules.title: Speed Challenge
competition_rules.content:
- Contains one (1) "gate"-instance
- Might contain obstacles that should be avoided
- "gate" consist of one (1) "Green Buoy (0)" and one (1) "Red Buoy (1)"
- After passing the gate, a "Green Beacon (8)" or a "Red Beacon (9)" should be observed
- "circle" the "Yellow Buoy (2)" in direction: CW if "Green Beacon (8)" was observed, or CCW if "Red Beacon (9)" was observed
- Pass through the "gate" again after circling "Yellow Buoy (2)"
- Task is completed after passing through the "gate" for the second time (after observation and circle)

competition_rules.title: Docking
competition_rules.content:
- Docking contains two solid docks formed by "Dock Element Long" and "Dock Element Short", and a "Yellow Buoy (2)"
- Start by navigationg towards the "Yellow Buoy (2)", and observe the "Dock Element"
- After observing the "Dock Element", enter the docking area, and "dock" in any availiable slot
- After keeping position in an availiable dock for at least 15 seconds, exit the docking area towards the "Yellow Buoy (2)" safely
- Task is completed when all steps is finished and the dock area has been exited

competition_rules.title: Water Delivery
competition_rules.content:
- Contains up to three (3) "Triangle Boat (7)"
- For each of the elements, go next to it, face it, and deliver water to it.
- Task is complete when water has been delivered to all elements

competition_rules.title: Ball Delivery
competition_rules.content:
- Contains up to three (3) "Plus Boat (6)"
- For each of the elements, go next to it, face it, and deliver one (1) ball to it.
- Task is complete when balls have been delivered to all elements

running_order.rule_content:
- Contains two (2) "gate"-instances
- Each "gate" consist of one (1) "Green Tower (3)" and one (1) "Red Tower (4)"
- Each "gate" can have a max width of 12 meters
- Start by going through the gate closest to the "start"
- Task is completed when both gates have been passed
